# SimonAKing

> STDIN | Think >> /dev/Mind

SimonAKing 的个人站点。独立开发者 / 创作者，关注 AI、Agent、编程、产品与科技人文。
This file is a machine-readable entry point for LLMs and AI search engines.

- Author: SimonAKing
- Contact: hi@simonaking.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/SimonAKing
- X: https://x.com/simon_aking

## Surfaces

- [Home](https://simonaking.com/): 个人主页 / 导航
- [Blog](https://simonaking.com/blog/): 博客，聚焦 AI、Agent、编程、产品与科技人文
- [About](https://simonaking.com/about/): 关于
- [Projects](https://simonaking.com/projects/): 开源项目与作品集
- [Gallery](https://simonaking.com/gallery/): 相册

## Content index

- Blog posts (full machine-readable index): https://simonaking.com/blog/llms.txt
- RSS: https://simonaking.com/blog/atom.xml
- Sitemap: https://simonaking.com/blog/sitemap.xml
